title: BUG #17549: wrong index scan plan with RLS
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE def (x Int32, y String, z UInt8 DEFAULT 1);
INSERT INTO def SELECT toInt32(rand() % 10000), toString(rand() % 10000), (rand() % 2);
CREATE INDEX def_index ON def(x, lower(y));
SELECT * FROM def WHERE x = 1 AND lower(y) = '1234';
SELECT * FROM def WHERE x = 1 AND y = '1234';
key_bug_features: RLS restricts index usage with non-leak-proof functional index
